userMessage: command for I2C trigger on address 0x50 read it back

response.text:
To set an I2C trigger on address 0x50 for a read operation, use the following commands.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Configure I2C trigger on address 0x50 for read direction on Bus1, Trigger A.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"write","command":"TRIGger:A:BUS:B1:I2C:ADDRess:VALue 0x50"},{"type":"write","command":"TRIGger:A:BUS:B1:I2C:ADDRess:MODe ADDR7"},{"type":"write","command":"TRIGger:A:BUS:B1:I2C:DATa:DIRection READ"},{"type":"write","command":"TRIGger:A:BUS:B1:I2C:CONDition ADDRess"}]}

actionsJson.summary: Configure I2C trigger on address 0x50 for read direction on Bus1, Trigger A.
